reminder.notes:
Release v2.19.0

Reliability fixes for alarms and updates:
- Reminders now ring quieter during a phone call (still full volume over videos/music).
- Lock-screen alarms are sticky: they stay up until you pick Complete, Dismiss, or Snooze, instead of sometimes collapsing into a notification banner.
- The in-app updater no longer gets stuck or lost if you minimize the app mid-download -- it holds the download alive and re-syncs progress when you return.

ai-scanner.notes: Fixes the real cause found via v1.0.15's diagnostics: declined duplicates were older library entries whose files were already gone from disk, not a permission problem. Missing files are now labeled visibly, cleaned up instead of retried, and entries with a file that still exists get a real gallery id resolved so they use the same permission-popup delete as everything else. Adds a manual Recheck button to Find Duplicates.

twinclean.notes: Moved from Beta to a stable listing. Adds: open any file directly from the app to double-check before cleaning; a visible evidence checklist (size, SHA-256 checksum, byte-for-byte match) on every duplicate group; granular Trash restore (single file, whole group, or everything at once).
